title: thelypteris organensis
intro: Thelypteris organensis, also known as the Organ Mountain fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to the Organ Mountains in New Mexico, USA, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris organensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in folk medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
